script:
set +e
echo '=== ts ==='; date -u +%FT%TZ
echo '=== sender scripts present ==='; ls /home/azureuser/*-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null
echo '=== mskai-send-to.sh ==='; cat /home/azureuser/mskai-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa-send-to.sh ==='; cat /home/azureuser/aixa-send-to.sh 2>/dev/null
echo '=== mskai-responder.py lines 760-810 ==='; sed -n '760,810p' /home/azureuser/mskai-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa-responder.py lines 760-810 ==='; sed -n '760,810p' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== END ==='
